title: MPG X High Quality
description: A resource pack for MorePowerGems, fused with PowerGems High Quality V3 pack
body:
# To know:

**A resource pack that adds textures to the MorePowerGems and PowerGems plugin.
This one is fused with the official PowerGems High Quality V3 Resource Pack.**

Parent project: https://modrinth.com/plugin/morepowergems


<details>
<summary>Note!</summary>

  You have to replace the offical PowerGems resource pack with this one in order to make this work. 

</details>
